title: 5-Fin Mini 800W Oil Filled Electric Portable Radiator Heater with Adjustable Thermostat
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: IDEAL FOR SMALLER ROOMS – Ideal for small-sized rooms such as bedrooms, offices, or study spaces, the Daewoo 800W compact oil-filled radiator efficiently provides focused and comforting warmth, ensuring a cozy environment during chilly weather

SAFETY FEATURE – The power switch will illuminates when in operation, providing a visual indicator of its status. The radiator is designed with front and rear feet for added stability, ensuring secure placement and reducing the risk of accidental tipping

PORTABLE AND COMPACT – The mini oil-filled radiator features a convenient carry handle, allowing easy transportation from room to room. Its compact design ensures space-efficient storage and placement, making it a versatile heating solution for any space

TEMPERATURE CONTROL – Equipped with a thermostat control, allowing you to easily regulate the temperature in your space. Enjoy personalized comfort by adjusting the heat output to suit your preferences, creating the perfect atmosphere for any room

LONG-LASTING ASSURANCE – Backed by a generous 3-year warranty to ensure extended protection and confidence in your Daewoo heating investment. Simply register online to activate and enjoy the comfort and warmth worry free
description: Product Description Unlock efficient zone heating with the Daewoo 800W Compact Oil-Filled Radiator, an ideal solution for optimizing warmth in specific areas. Perfect for small rooms such as bedrooms, offices, and study spaces, this compact radiator ensures focused and customizable heating tailored to your preferences. Designed for those seeking a versatile heating companion, the Daewoo 800W Compact Oil-Filled Radiator offers a convenient carry handle for portability and a space-saving design for easy storage. Safety features, including an illuminated power switch and stable front and rear feet, prioritize your well-being. Additionally, benefit from an extended 3-year warranty, subject to online registration, ensuring long-lasting peace of mind. Experience the perfect blend of comfort, safety, and flexibility with the Daewoo 800W Compact Oil-Filled Radiator, your go-to solution for staying warm during chilly weather. Whether you're working, studying, or relaxing, this radiator provides the right amount of warmth exactly where you need it. Box Contains 800W RADIATOR

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Always disconnect the heater from the mains power supply and allow to cool before cleaning, Clean outside of the heater with a clean damp cloth. Never clean with harsh or abrasive cleaners, DO NOT submerge any part of the heater in water or any other liquids, DO NOT wrap the mains cable around the appliance
